description: Validation queries for BM25 search index. Rewritten for term-density matching with realistic path patterns.

queries.query: gsd reviewer discipline real drag version proof source pass REVIEWER_PROMPT
queries.expected_answer_summary: GSD reviewer discipline rules for Diagram contours: real drag testing, version proof, no source-only passes.
queries.pass_criteria: At least 3 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.

queries.query: metrics react bundle bpmn perf baseline diagram modeler drag EXEC_REPORT
queries.expected_answer_summary: Performance contour history for diagram drag: baseline metrics, React bundle dominance, unresolved drag issues.
queries.pass_criteria: At least 3 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.

queries.query: react baseline jank processstage drag unresolved bpmn diagram bottlenecks
queries.expected_answer_summary: Current diagram performance bottlenecks: React baseline jank, ProcessStage/App shell, unresolved drag issues.
queries.pass_criteria: At least 3 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.

queries.query: RAG forbidden secrets auto mutation bpmn xml product actions drafts truth INDEXING_POLICY
queries.expected_answer_summary: RAG forbidden actions: no secrets indexing, no auto-mutation, no BPMN XML writes, no Product Actions auto-apply, no AI drafts as truth.
queries.pass_criteria: At least 4 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.

queries.query: indexed source paths project atlas planning contours docs handoff frontend backend exclusions SOURCE_REGISTRY
queries.expected_answer_summary: Indexed source paths: Project Atlas, .planning/contours, docs/, PROCESSMAP/HANDOFF, frontend/src, backend/, tools/, scripts/.
queries.pass_criteria: At least 4 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.

queries.query: clearvestnic opt processmap test 5180 8088 runtime RUNTIME_NAVIGATION RUNTIME_PROOF
queries.pass_criteria: At least 3 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.

queries.query: Agent 3 review diagram performance gsd reviewer discipline fresh 5180 proof real user scenario metrics EXEC_REPORT
queries.expected_answer_summary: Agent 3 review criteria: GSD reviewer discipline, fresh 5180 proof, real user scenario, before/after metrics, CHANGES_REQUESTED if fail.
queries.pass_criteria: At least 4 expected terms appear in top-8 snippets AND at least 2 expected path patterns match top-8 results.
